# Expected: react-native-expo

## Scanner MUST detect

- **DETECT**: language: typescript
- **DETECT**: framework: expo

## Skills that MUST be recommended

- Expo skills (expo/skills)
- React Native skills
- Mobile-specific testing
- security-review

## Skills that MUST NOT be recommended

- Next.js / web-only frontend
- Docker / server infrastructure
- Database skills (unless user indicates backend separately)
- Vue / Vite
